title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: local LLM runner with Docker-like CLI for Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API (Node & browser).

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama.

title: langchain-community/llms Ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or chat endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API and Spring integration.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for interacting with Ollama’s REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models as GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready docker-compose stack with Ollama, WebUI, Nginx, and GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code, docs, or chat with any Ollama model from within editor.

title: ollama-chat-electron
summary: Lightweight cross-platform desktop chat client built with Electron.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify LLMOps platform added Ollama as a native model provider for local deployments.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models for generative QA and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 client library for Ollama with dependency injection and streaming support.

title: ollama-ts
summary: TypeScript-first Ollama client on npm with Zod validation and ESM-only exports.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantization recipes.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that uses local Ollama models for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: LogSeq plugin to run local LLM prompts on blocks and pages via Ollama.
